name: Okra Extravaganza#2
recipeIngredient: 1 large Pineapple, fresh, green, with fronds included
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the pineapple in half lengthwise.
2. Remove and discard the core, then cut the pineapple into 1-inch chunks. Set aside.
3. In a wok, combine the scallions, garlic, ginger, pepper, okra, soy sauce, and sherry.
4. Stir-fry over high heat until the vegetables are tender-crisp, about 4 minutes. Add one teaspoon of water if the vegetables appear to be sticking.
5. Add the pineapple chunks, cover, and continue cooking for an additional 3 minutes.
6. Spoon the mixture into the pineapple shells and serve immediately.
